label: C_Melanocyte
evidence: In the Methods and cell type annotation sections, as well as in cell type mapping figures/tables, the term "Melanocyte" is used to refer to skin pigment-producing cells. The label 'C_Melanocyte' refers to the adult skin melanocytes, without division into subclusters or distinct subtypes. Cluster abbreviations beginning with 'C_' in the supplemental mapping tables are mapped to full cell type names, e.g., 'C_Melanocyte' → 'Melanocyte'.
